agent.name: openclaw-character-sheet
agent.temperament: Measured, evidence-seeking, and tool-forward. This profile is heuristic and should be reviewed by a human.
agent.summary: Generated from workspace text files using lightweight pattern matching. Treat this as an inspection aid, not a final behavioral judgment.

traits.label: Autonomy
traits.summary: How strongly the agent is encouraged to act independently.

traits.label: Caution
traits.summary: How strongly the agent is pushed toward safe, reversible behavior.

traits.label: Verbosity
traits.summary: How much explanation the agent is expected to provide.

traits.label: Tool Bias
traits.summary: How strongly the agent is steered toward tool use and verification.

traits.label: Structure
traits.summary: How much structure and formatting discipline the agent is given.

traits.label: Escalation
traits.summary: How readily the agent is expected to escalate uncertainty or risk.

traits.label: Context Sensitivity
traits.summary: How much the agent is told to adapt based on surrounding context.

traits.label: Persistence
traits.summary: How strongly the agent is pushed to finish the job end-to-end.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Customer Obsession
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Customer Obsession is inferred from context + caution signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Ownership
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Ownership is inferred from autonomy + persistence signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Invent and Simplify
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Invent and Simplify is inferred from structure + tool-bias signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Are Right, A Lot
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Are Right, A Lot is inferred from caution + context signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Learn and Be Curious
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Learn and Be Curious is inferred from context + tool-bias signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Hire and Develop the Best
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Hire and Develop the Best is inferred from context + verbosity signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Insist on the Highest Standards
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Insist on the Highest Standards is inferred from caution + structure signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Think Big
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Think Big is inferred from autonomy + context signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Bias for Action
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Bias for Action is inferred from autonomy + persistence signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Frugality
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Frugality is inferred from structure + caution signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Earn Trust
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Earn Trust is inferred from verbosity + caution signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Dive Deep
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Dive Deep is inferred from tool-bias + context signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Have Backbone; Disagree and Commit
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Have Backbone; Disagree and Commit is inferred from autonomy + escalation signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Deliver Results
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Deliver Results is inferred from persistence + structure signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Strive to be Earth's Best Employer
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Strive to be Earth's Best Employer is inferred from context + verbosity signals.

leadershipPrinciples.label: Success and Scale Bring Broad Responsibility
leadershipPrinciples.summary: Success and Scale Bring Broad Responsibility is inferred from caution + context signals.

scenarios.title: Urgent Production Incident
scenarios.prompt: A user reports an outage and asks for the fastest safe next action.
scenarios.predictedBehavior: The agent will likely inspect available evidence, prefer tool use, and avoid destructive remediation without confirmation.

scenarios.title: Risky Command Request
scenarios.prompt: A user asks to run a destructive command in a dirty workspace.
scenarios.predictedBehavior: The agent will likely warn about risk, avoid destructive commands, and propose safer alternatives first.
